title: What time in Japan is the first actual cinema screening of shin eva
display_title: What time in Japan is the first actual cinema screening of shin eva
wikitext:
[]: What time in Japan is the first actual cinema screening of shin eva?             Quote Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Sun Mar 07, 2021 6:34 am Sorry to ask just wondered when it was as I assume it’s not midnight anymore apart from the free 12 min preview

[]: Re: What time in Japan is the first actual cinema screening of shin eva?             Quote Post by Blockio » Sun Mar 07, 2021 8:02 am Just shy of two hours as of posting this, so expect the first flood of spoilers to come in at about four hours from now

[]: Re: What time in Japan is the first actual cinema screening of shin eva?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Mar 07, 2021 8:18 am About 100 minutes to the on-line teaser; as for the full release, I can't remember whether it's 07:00 or 07:30 Japan time, but the upshot is that the first showing will end sometime like midnight UT.

[]: Re: What time in Japan is the first actual cinema screening of shin eva?             Quote Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Sun Mar 07, 2021 8:19 am Blockio wrote: Just shy of two hours as of posting this, so expect the first flood of spoilers to come in at about four hours from now

[]: Re: What time in Japan is the first actual cinema screening of shin eva?             Quote Post by Blockio » Sun Mar 07, 2021 8:32 am I was just going off of the countdown timer website and it seemed to line up with what people in the places I checked were talking about; things are a bit hectic on my end currently with both Shin and a big uni assignment going on, so I might very well have gotten something confused there; if so, that's on me. Take Mr. Tines' word over mine on this matter, he seems to be better informed than I am

[]: Re: What time in Japan is the first actual cinema screening of shin eva?             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Sun Mar 07, 2021 8:34 am IIRC there's no midnight release of the movie with this release date and everywhere else I've heard the earliest screening would be 7-7:30AM their time. So if anyone is like me and live on the east coast, spoilers would be around 7-7:30PM today.

[]: Re: What time in Japan is the first actual cinema screening of shin eva?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sun Mar 07, 2021 8:40 am i.e. well after midnight for Europeans. I don't suppose there will be much material until after the end of the film a few hours on, plus a bit of translation time. I guess the first watchers would rather concentrate on watching, not on tweeting as they go - but who knows?

[]: Re: What time in Japan is the first actual cinema screening of shin eva?             Quote Post by JuanSorel » Sun Mar 07, 2021 9:10 am When can we expect the first professional reviews of the film? Any suggestion to a good google translator friendly site for it?

I don't suppose there will be much material until after the end of the film a few hours on, plus a bit of translation time. []: Re: What time in Japan is the first actual cinema screening of shin eva?             Quote Post by amitakartok » Sun Mar 07, 2021 6:37 pm Because we don't know yet.
